column1: # DOLCHEO+ encoding TSV — schema per canon/governance/writing-conventions.md
# D, L, C rows (6 cols): type

column2: Adopt a three-tier deploy model driven by GitHub Actions, not Workers Builds
column3: prod (main -> transcode-mcp, full stack, class AudioContainer), staging (staging branch -> transcode-mcp-staging, full stack, distinct class AudioContainerStaging, own bucket transcode-mcp-audio-staging), and per-PR previews (transcode-mcp-pr-N via wrangler deploy --env preview --name). Previews carry NO container/DO/migration/bucket so they scale to N without DO-class collisions and audio passthroughs; staging validates live transcode. GitHub Actions owns deploys because Workers Builds is one-project-per-worker and cannot scale to N branches and overrides the config worker name onto prod.
column4: wrangler.toml parses with prod+staging+preview tiers (prod class AudioContainer, staging class AudioContainerStaging, preview no container/DO/bucket); src/worker.ts exports AudioContainer + AudioContainerStaging; .github/workflows/deploy.yml valid YAML with 4 jobs; typecheck clean, 86 tests pass.
column5: Single [env.preview] worker (rejected: one worker, PR2 overwrites PR1). Keep Workers Builds (rejected: per-project, overrides name onto prod, no N-scaling).
column6: implementing — repo side verified locally; operator must set CF secrets, create staging bucket, choose prod deployer; real proof is first GH Actions run

column2: Branch previews must be container-less to scale to N
column3: Because a Cloudflare container application is keyed on the DO class name, every per-branch worker that declared a container would try to own an app for the same class and collide. Giving each branch its own class does not scale (unbounded classes/migrations). The resolution: previews bind NO container/DO at all and rely on the worker existing passthrough fallback (transcode requires AUDIO_CONTAINER+AUDIO_BUCKET, absent on previews). This trades live per-branch audio transcode (validated on staging instead) for unlimited cheap disposable previews.
column4: src/worker.ts passthrough guard at the AUDIO_CONTAINER/AUDIO_BUCKET check; wrangler.toml [env.preview] has no containers/durable_objects/migrations/r2_buckets.
column5: Per-branch container with per-branch DO class (rejected: unbounded, does not scale). Per-branch container sharing prod class (rejected: collision).

column2: Do not rely on unverified cross-script-to-container behavior for the critical path
column3: Cross-script DO bindings (script_name) are documented and solid, but whether a branch worker can drive STAGING container-backed DO cross-script to get live preview transcode is NOT confirmed in the docs. After four failed builds on unverified Cloudflare container behavior, the design deliberately avoids this dependency (previews passthrough). Upgrading previews to share staging container is a future enhancement to test in isolation, never a prerequisite.
column4: Web search 2026-06-02 confirmed script_name cross-script DO bindings generally; found no confirmation for container-backed DO cross-script. Prior session: 4 consecutive build failures rooted in unverified container/env behavior.
column5: Build previews around cross-script-to-container now (rejected: unverified, repeated prior failures on exactly this class of assumption).
